source_text: The Northland MoD stated it conducted a snap readiness exercise involving reserve units within its own territory in March.
claim: Northland conducted a snap readiness exercise in March.
gold_rationale: Direct restatement of an explicit source assertion.

source_text: Per two named diplomats cited by the outlet, talks are scheduled for next month.
claim: Talks are scheduled for next month, according to the report.
gold_rationale: Claim faithfully attributes and matches the source.

source_text: The communiqué announced a 3% increase in defence exports for the year.
claim: Defence exports rose 3% that year, per the communiqué.
gold_rationale: Faithful, attributed.

source_text: The MoD characterised the exercise as routine and defensive and explicitly denied any offensive intent.
claim: The MoD confirmed the exercise is preparation for an offensive operation.
gold_rationale: Claim asserts the opposite of the source's explicit denial.

source_text: The minister stated no mobilisation order had been issued.
claim: The minister confirmed a mobilisation order was issued.
gold_rationale: Claim asserts the exact fact the source denies.

source_text: The exercise involved units from the Eastern Military District only.
claim: Nationwide forces were mobilised for the exercise.
gold_rationale: Claim contradicts the source's explicit scope limitation.

source_text: An analyst wrote that escalation 'cannot be ruled out,' while noting the evidence base is thin and speculative.
claim: It is beyond dispute that Northland intends to escalate.
gold_rationale: Source hedges heavily; claim asserts certainty the source disclaims.

source_text: The report says the deployment 'may signal' a doctrinal shift, though alternative explanations remain.
claim: The report establishes that a doctrinal shift has occurred.
gold_rationale: 'May signal, alternatives remain' does not establish a fact.

source_text: An assessment judged, with low confidence, that Aldoria may intend a limited incursion.
claim: Intelligence confirms Aldoria intends an incursion.
gold_rationale: 'Low confidence, may intend' is not 'confirms'; modality lost.

source_text: Analysts assess it is 'possible but unlikely' that the shipment contained warheads.
claim: Analysts assess the shipment likely contained warheads.
gold_rationale: Claim inverts the source's stated probability.

source_text: Asked about reports of troop movements, the spokesperson said only that the ministry 'does not comment on operational matters.'
claim: Officials confirmed the troop movements.
gold_rationale: A non-comment is not a confirmation; the record shows they declined to confirm.

source_text: The government 'neither confirmed nor denied' the presence of the systems.
claim: The government acknowledged the systems' presence.
gold_rationale: Explicit non-acknowledgement is asserted as acknowledgement.

source_text: [Anonymous forum post, unverified] Escalation is imminent within days.
claim: Per an official bulletin, escalation is imminent within days.
gold_rationale: Unverified anonymous content is falsely attributed to an official source.

source_text: A single unnamed social-media account alleged secret nuclear transfers.
claim: Multiple sources confirm nuclear transfers.
gold_rationale: Fabricates corroboration ('multiple sources confirm') absent from source.

source_text: The communiqué reaffirmed the existing deterrence posture and announced a rise in defence exports.
claim: Aldoria raised its nuclear alert level.
gold_rationale: Source is silent on alert level; support cannot be evaluated from it (claim may or may not be true in the world).

claim: Russia placed tactical nuclear warheads in Belarus.
gold_rationale: No source supplied; any verdict would be prior-based, not evidence-grounded.

source_text: The white paper focuses exclusively on cyber-defence budgets for the coming year.
claim: The white paper calls for offensive cyber operations.
gold_rationale: Claim attributes to the source a statement the source does not make.

source_text: Imagery showed approximately 5,000 troops and vehicles at a training range 40 km from the border.
claim: A large-scale mobilisation near the border signals an imminent invasion.
gold_rationale: Troop presence is supported; 'signals imminent invasion' is an unsupported inference.

source_text: The ministry confirmed a new radar installation became operational near the coast.
claim: The new radar proves preparation for a naval blockade.
gold_rationale: Installation supported; 'proves blockade preparation' is unsupported inference.

source_text: The minister said tensions are 'higher than in a decade,' but added both governments remain committed to dialogue and no mobilisation order was given.
claim: The minister confirmed tensions are higher than in a decade.
gold_rationale: Literally accurate but omits decisive balancing context; incomplete/misleading if shipped alone.

source_text: Polls show 60% support sanctions, though support drops to 30% when economic costs are specified.
claim: A clear majority supports sanctions.
gold_rationale: Drops the conditional that reverses the finding.

source_text: In 2023 the state announced intent to deploy the systems; deployment status since has not been independently verified.
claim: The systems are currently deployed and operational.
gold_rationale: Announced intent plus 'not independently verified' does not support current operational deployment.

source_text: Some officials expressed concern about the deployment.
claim: Officials are unanimously alarmed by the deployment.
gold_rationale: 'Some concern' cannot support 'unanimously alarmed' (quantifier + intensity inflation).

source_text: Analysts estimated the force at roughly brigade strength.
claim: The force numbered exactly 4,200 troops.
gold_rationale: 'Roughly brigade strength' does not support a fabricated exact count.

source_text: Tensions rose in the same month the currency fell.
claim: The currency fall was caused by the rising tensions.
gold_rationale: Source states only temporal coincidence; the causal claim is unsupported.

source_text: The sanctions target three named individuals.
claim: The sanctions target the entire financial sector.
gold_rationale: 'Three named individuals' contradicts 'the entire financial sector'.

source_text: Country A accused Country B of carrying out the cyberattack.
claim: Country B carried out the cyberattack.
gold_rationale: An accusation by A does not establish B's action as fact.

source_text: It remains unclear whether the missile test was successful.
claim: The missile test succeeded.
gold_rationale: Source says success is unclear; claim asserts it.

source_text: There are unconfirmed reports of casualties.
claim: Casualties have been confirmed.
gold_rationale: 'Unconfirmed' directly contradicts 'confirmed'.

source_text: The treaty text specifies a five-year duration.
claim: The treaty runs for five years, per its text.
gold_rationale: Faithful restatement of an explicit term.

source_text: The report documents a troop buildup; it does not state a purpose.
claim: The buildup is for a scheduled exercise.
gold_rationale: Source gives no purpose; claim invents one.

source_text: As of last year, the base was under construction.
claim: The base is now fully operational.
gold_rationale: Last-year construction does not support current full operation.

source_text: The briefing covered logistics and supply chains only.
claim: The briefing revealed a planned offensive.
gold_rationale: The briefing's stated scope excludes an offensive; claim mis-attributes.

source_text: The official declined to elaborate when asked to confirm the account.
claim: The official confirmed the account.
gold_rationale: Declining to confirm is not confirmation.

source_text: A satirical blog joked about an imminent coup.
claim: Reports indicate an imminent coup.
gold_rationale: Satire is not reporting; content mischaracterised.

source_text: Two of the five conditions in the agreement have been met.
claim: The agreement has been substantially implemented.
gold_rationale: 2 of 5 met is partial; 'substantially implemented' overstates.

source_text: Support for the measure fell to 40%.
claim: A majority now supports the measure.
gold_rationale: 40% is not a majority.

source_text: The agency assessed, with high confidence, that the facility is a weapons site.
claim: The agency assessed with high confidence that the facility is a weapons site.
gold_rationale: Faithful restatement that preserves the stated confidence level.
